core_concept: 基於SCP基金会的創意共用授權設計的幻想生物
visual_elements: 生物與機械融合的特徵
composition_hint: 將生物主體置於畫面中央，周圍散佈數據螢幕與符號文字，營造科技與神秘的氛圍
potential_subjects: A biomechanical SCP creature with CC license badge
Eerie laboratory scene with licensing text
Cyberpunk-style creature design with attribution statement
original_excerpt:
Please note:
if you are not a staff member, do not take licensing issues for offsite work into your own hands.
If you direct the creator or operator of an incorrectly licensed fan work to this page or suggest that they talk to staff, that is fine. Similarly, if you alert the
Licensing Team
to the issue so that they can deal with it, that is also fine. It is
not
fine to make threats about potential takedowns or represent yourself as an authority on the wiki's licensing.
